title: Mount Hotaka
summary:
Mount Hotaka may refer to:

Mount Hotaka (Gunma) (武尊山, Hotaka-yama), a stratovolcano in Gunma Prefecture, Japan
Mount Hotaka (Nagano, Gifu) (穂高岳, Hotaka-dake), a mountain in Nagano and Gifu Prefectures, Japan
